news.title:
18 BSE 500 firms surpass FY25 revenue, EBITDA, net profit in 9 months.
Finance and capex-focused companies lead performance surge amid volatility.
news.summary:
18 BSE 500 firms surpass FY25 revenue, EBITDA, net profit in 9 months.
Finance and capex-focused companies lead performance surge amid volatility.

news.title:
GE Vernova T&D India executed an NSE block trade worth Rs. 19.1 cr for ~55,322 shares.
The block trade price stood at Rs. 3445 per share.
news.summary:
GE Vernova T&D India executed an NSE block trade worth Rs. 19.1 cr for ~55,322 shares.
The block trade price stood at Rs. 3445 per share.

news.title:
GE Vernova T&D India shareholders approved key resolutions on Mar 20, 2026.
Ms. Rashmi Joshi appointed as Independent Director; Mr. Sandeep Zanzaria reappointed as MD & CEO.
news.summary:
GE Vernova T&D India shareholders approved key resolutions on Mar 20, 2026.
Ms. Rashmi Joshi appointed as Independent Director; Mr. Sandeep Zanzaria reappointed as MD & CEO.

news.title:
GE Vernova T&D India surged 3,045.5% in 5 years, turning ₹1 lakh into ₹31.45 lakh, backed by strong growth.
The company operates debt-free with robust financials, a ₹15.9B cash balance, and a diversified order pipeline.
news.summary:
GE Vernova T&D India surged 3,045.5% in 5 years, turning ₹1 lakh into ₹31.45 lakh, backed by strong growth.
The company operates debt-free with robust financials, a ₹15.9B cash balance, and a diversified order pipeline.

news.title:
GE Vernova T&D India executed NSE block trade for 150,981 shares.
Trade priced at Rs. 3,680.7/share, totaling Rs. 55.6 crores.
news.summary:
GE Vernova T&D India executed NSE block trade for 150,981 shares.
Trade priced at Rs. 3,680.7/share, totaling Rs. 55.6 crores.

news.title:
GE Vernova T&D India reported robust Q3 FY26 results with revenue at INR17B, up 58% YoY, and PBT at INR4.6B, a 2.4x increase YoY.
Order bookings reached INR29.4B, growing 41% YoY, excluding Adani HVDC project. Order backlog stands at INR143.8B, up 10% QoQ.
news.summary:
GE Vernova T&D India reported robust Q3 FY26 results with revenue at INR17B, up 58% YoY, and PBT at INR4.6B, a 2.4x increase YoY.
Order bookings reached INR29.4B, growing 41% YoY, excluding Adani HVDC project. Order backlog stands at INR143.8B, up 10% QoQ.

news.title:
GE Vernova T&D India surged 8.1% on 4 Feb 2026, hitting Rs 3813.4.
The stock achieved a 52-week and all-time high, outperforming its sector and market.
news.summary:
GE Vernova T&D India surged 8.1% on 4 Feb 2026, hitting Rs 3813.4.
The stock achieved a 52-week and all-time high, outperforming its sector and market.

news.title:
India's energy demand is rising, targeting 500 GW non-fossil capacity by 2030, requiring ₹40 lakh crore investment.
GE Vernova, CG Power, and TARIL lead with strong order books, profitability, and plans for growth in power infrastructure.
news.summary:
India's energy demand is rising, targeting 500 GW non-fossil capacity by 2030, requiring ₹40 lakh crore investment.
GE Vernova, CG Power, and TARIL lead with strong order books, profitability, and plans for growth in power infrastructure.

news.title:
GE Vernova T&D plans INR 1,000 Cr investment, projects lasting till FY26-28.
Export orders boost profit margins; product prices linked to raw material costs.
news.summary:
GE Vernova T&D plans INR 1,000 Cr investment, projects lasting till FY26-28.
Export orders boost profit margins; product prices linked to raw material costs.

news.title:
GE Vernova T&D posted Q3 EBITDA of 4.5B, up from 1.8B YoY.
EBITDA margin rose significantly to 26.7% from 16.7% YoY.
news.summary:
GE Vernova T&D posted Q3 EBITDA of 4.5B, up from 1.8B YoY.
EBITDA margin rose significantly to 26.7% from 16.7% YoY.

news.title:
GE Vernova T&D India approved Q3 FY2025 unaudited results, reporting Rs. 8,814.8M net profit for 9M FY2026.
Ms. Rashmi Joshi appointed as Independent Director; MD Mr. Sandeep Zanzaria reappointed for 3 years.
news.summary:
GE Vernova T&D India approved Q3 FY2025 unaudited results, reporting Rs. 8,814.8M net profit for 9M FY2026.
Ms. Rashmi Joshi appointed as Independent Director; MD Mr. Sandeep Zanzaria reappointed for 3 years.

news.title:
GE Vernova T&D India Ltd will hold a board meeting on Jan 28, 2026, to approve Q3 FY25 unaudited financial results.
Trading window remains closed from Jan 1 to Jan 30, 2026, as per compliance regulations.

news.title:
GE Vernova T&D India Ltd received an ESG rating of 66 from NSE Sustainability.
The ESG rating was independently prepared based on FY24-25 public data without company engagement.
news.summary:
GE Vernova T&D India Ltd received an ESG rating of 66 from NSE Sustainability.

news.title:
Capital goods sector depends on govt orders and overseas business as private sector investment remains flat.
Public sector allocations in FY27 Budget are unlikely to see significant increases.
news.summary:
Capital goods sector depends on govt orders and overseas business as private sector investment remains flat.
Public sector allocations in FY27 Budget are unlikely to see significant increases.

news.title:
Nomura forecasts Q3FY26 order inflows decline by 19% YoY for capital goods, led by high base and weak private capex. L&T's inflows dip 32% YoY.
BEL's inflows surge 148% YoY, while HAL's drop 68%. Solar firms Waaree, Premier see strong revenue growth of 75% and 23%, respectively.
news.summary:
Nomura forecasts Q3FY26 order inflows decline by 19% YoY for capital goods, led by high base and weak private capex. L&T's inflows dip 32% YoY.
BEL's inflows surge 148% YoY, while HAL's drop 68%. Solar firms Waaree, Premier see strong revenue growth of 75% and 23%, respectively.

news.title:
GE Vernova T&D India surged 11% after securing an order from Adani Energy Solutions.
The stock, up 2780% in 3 years, nears its 52-week high of ₹3,323.70.
news.summary:
GE Vernova T&D India surged 11% after securing an order from Adani Energy Solutions.
The stock, up 2780% in 3 years, nears its 52-week high of ₹3,323.70.

news.title: GE Vernova T&D shares surged nearly 9% after a major order win from AESL HDVC.
news.summary: GE Vernova T&D shares surged nearly 9% after a major order win from AESL HDVC.

news.title:
GE Vernova T&D India awarded 2500 MW 500 kV HVDC VSC Terminal contract by AESL Projects.
The domestic order involves execution from KPS 3 Khavda to South Olpad over multiple years.
news.summary:
GE Vernova T&D India awarded 2500 MW 500 kV HVDC VSC Terminal contract by AESL Projects.
